creator: gigigranvisir@gmail.com
text:
Launched as normal user it behaves strangely: application of an effect results in an empty track. Selecting a portion of a track and creating silence results in an extended silenced part of the same.
Launched as Root, everything is ok.
These issues do not appear under Windows 10 and Linux UbuntuStudio 16.10
Tested on two pc's with mint installation of FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p6, packages updated via pkg. Compiled port has same issues.
